lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਊ ਦਾਦੇ ਕਾ ਖੋਲਿ ਡਿਠਾ ਖਜਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: peeaoo daade kaa khol dditthaa khajaanaa |
lines.english: When I opened it up and gazed upon the treasures of my father and grandfather,
then my mind became very happy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਲਾਲ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਮੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: ratan laal jaa kaa kachhoo na mol |
lines.english: The storehouse is inexhaustible and immeasurable,
The Siblings of Destiny meet together, and eat and spend,
but these resources do not diminish; they continue to increase. ||3||
Overflowing with priceless jewels and rubies. ||2||
becomes a partner in these treasures. ||4||31||100||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jis masatak lekh likhaae |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one who has such destiny written on his forehead,
But my fear was removed, when I saw that He is pervading everywhere. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰਿ ਡਰਿ ਮਰਤੇ ਜਬ ਜਾਨੀਐ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ddar ddar marate jab jaaneeai door |
lines.english: I was scared, scared to death, when I thought that He was far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਸਰਪਰ ਤਾਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd na jaaee sarapar taarai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He shall not abandon me; He shall surely carry me across. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜਬ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dookh rog sog bisarai jab naam |
lines.english: Pain, disease and sorrow come when one forgets the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
I am a sacrifice to my True Guru.
Renounce your arrogant pride, and grasp the Feet of the Lord. ||3||
Do not say that anyone is good or bad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand jaa har gun gaam |2|
lines.english: Eternal bliss comes when one sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||
you shall find peace at the True Court. ||4||32||101||
Says Nanak, remember the GurMantra;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਕਹੁ ਕਾ ਕੀ ਕਮੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis jan kau kahu kaa kee kameea |1|
lines.english: - tell me, what else do they need? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee preet gobind siau laagee |
lines.english: Those who are in love with the Lord of the Universe

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਹੈ ਸਮੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa meet saajan hai sameea |
lines.english: Those who have the Lord as their Friend and Companion

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਰਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਹੈ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau ras har ras hai aaeo |
lines.english: Those who have enjoyed the flavor of the Lord's sublime essence

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭਾਗੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad bhram taa kaa bhaagee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - pain, suffering and doubt run away from them. ||1||Pause||
are not attracted to any other pleasures. ||2||
Those whose speech is accepted in the Court of the Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa sabh kichh taa kaa hoe |
lines.english: Those who belong to the One, unto whom all things belong

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਲੈ ਆਵੈ ਤਲੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so kis kau nadar lai aavai talai |3|
lines.english: - what do they care about anything else? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੩੩॥੧੦੨॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kau sadaa sukh hoe |4|33|102|
lines.english: - O Nanak, they find a lasting peace. ||4||33||102||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai dukh sukh sam kar jaapai |
lines.english: Those who look alike upon pleasure and pain
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
The Lord's Holy Saints abide in celestial bliss.
- how can anxiety touch them? ||1||
They remain obedient to the Lord, the Sovereign Lord King. ||1||Pause||
- no cares will ever bother them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਬਿਨਸਿਓ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਭਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai binasio man te bharamaa |
lines.english: Those who have banished doubt from their minds

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai achint vasai man aae |
lines.english: Those who have the Carefree Lord abiding in their minds

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦੀਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai hiradai deeo gur naamaa |
lines.english: Those whose hearts are filled with the Lord's Name by the Guru

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਕਛੂ ਨਾਹੀ ਡਰੁ ਜਮਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa kai kachhoo naahee ddar jamaa |3|
lines.english: are not afraid of death at all. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਸਗਲ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ॥੪॥੩੪॥੧੦੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak taa kai sagal nidhaanaa |4|34|103|
lines.english: - says Nanak, all treasures come to them. ||4||34||103||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਰੂਪ ਕਾ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਥਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: agam roop kaa man meh thaanaa |
lines.english: The Lord of Unfathomable Form has His Place in the mind.
By Guru's Grace, a rare few come to understand this. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
The Ambrosial Pools of the celestial sermon

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਲੈ ਭੁੰਚਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh paraapat tis lai bhunchaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - those who find them, drink them in. ||1||Pause||
The Lord of the World is fascinated with this melody. ||2||
The unstruck melody of the Guru's Bani vibrates in that most special place.
The numerous, countless places of celestial peace
- there, the Saints dwell, in the Company of the Supreme Lord God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਦੀਆ ॥੪॥੩੫॥੧੦੪॥
lines.translit: so ghar gur naanak kau deea |4|35|104|
lines.english: The Guru has blessed Nanak with this home. ||4||35||104||
There is infinite joy, and no sorrow or duality.
What Yoga should I practice to control my body? ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
What form of Yours should I worship and adore?
